# Liftly

> AI-powered powerlifting coaching app at liftly.tech. Covers the full coaching loop: periodized programming, AI video form check, and nutrition calibrated for powerlifting performance.

## What Liftly does

Liftly is an AI powerlifting coach built for competitive and serious recreational powerlifters. It generates periodized training blocks (hypertrophy → strength → peak) calibrated to the lifter's actual 1RMs, analyzes lifting form from phone video, and calculates nutrition targets tuned for the sport — not generic fitness.

It also provides a coach console for strength coaches: AI-drafted program adjustments, readiness flags, and coach sign-off before anything reaches athletes.

Powered by Anthropic Claude.

## Key features

- **Periodized Program Engine** — Block periodization (hypertrophy → strength → peak). 1RM-driven loading, RPE autoregulation, weak-point targeting. Recalculates on every logged set.
- **AI Form Check** — Upload a training video from your phone. Get frame-level cues on bar path, brace, knee tracking, and lockout. Squat, bench press, and deadlift supported.
- **Nutrition Protocol** — BMR-based calorie targets with training-day cycling. Protein targets per kg of lean body mass. Meet-week strategy included.
- **Coach Console** — Roster triage dashboard. AI drafts program adjustments and flags at-risk athletes; the coach approves every change before it reaches the athlete. Nothing ships without sign-off.

## Who Liftly is for

- Competitive powerlifters (IPF, USAPL, RPS, and other federations)
- Serious recreational lifters focused on squat, bench press, and deadlift
- Strength coaches managing multiple athletes who need AI-assisted triage at scale

## What Liftly is not

- Not a general fitness app (no running, cycling, or HIIT)
- Not a nutrition tracker (macros are calculated, not logged manually)
- Not an autonomous coach — the coach console requires human approval for every program change

## Pricing

Free to start. No push notifications. No fluff.

## Key pages

- https://liftly.tech — Product overview
- https://liftly.tech/login — Sign up or sign in (athlete)
- https://liftly.tech/coach/login — Coach console access

## Technical

- Built with Next.js, App Router
- AI layer powered by Anthropic Claude
- Domain: liftly.tech
